mapper.select: SELECT ROW_ID AS "rowId", SECTION_CODE AS "sectionCode", SECTION_ORDR AS "sectionOrder", COMMON_NAME AS "commonName", FORMULA AS "formula", AR4_VALUE AS "ar4Value", AR5_VALUE AS "ar5Value", AR6_VALUE AS "ar6Value", SOURCE_TXT AS "source", MANUAL_INPUT_VALUE AS "manualInputValue", NOTE_TXT AS "note", SOURCE_DOCUMENT_NM AS "sourceDocumentName", SOURCE_PAGE_NO AS "sourcePageNo", SORT_ORDR AS "sortOrder", TO_CHAR(LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "lastChangedAt", COALESCE(LAST_UPDUSR_ID, FRST_REGISTER_ID) AS "lastChangedBy" FROM ADMIN_EMISSION_GWP_VALUE ORDER BY SECTION_ORDR, SORT_ORDR, COMMON_NAME

SELECT ROW_ID AS "rowId", SECTION_CODE AS "sectionCode", SECTION_ORDR AS "sectionOrder", COMMON_NAME AS "commonName", FORMULA AS "formula", AR4_VALUE AS "ar4Value", AR5_VALUE AS "ar5Value", AR6_VALUE AS "ar6Value", SOURCE_TXT AS "source", MANUAL_INPUT_VALUE AS "manualInputValue", NOTE_TXT AS "note", SOURCE_DOCUMENT_NM AS "sourceDocumentName", SOURCE_PAGE_NO AS "sourcePageNo", SORT_ORDR AS "sortOrder", TO_CHAR(LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "lastChangedAt", COALESCE(LAST_UPDUSR_ID, FRST_REGISTER_ID) AS "lastChangedBy" FROM ADMIN_EMISSION_GWP_VALUE WHERE ROW_ID = #{_parameter}
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(ROW_ID, 5) AS INTEGER)), 0) FROM ADMIN_EMISSION_GWP_VALUE WHERE ROW_ID LIKE 'GWP_%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ADMIN_EMISSION_GWP_VALUE ( ROW_ID, SECTION_CODE, SECTION_ORDR, COMMON_NAME, FORMULA, AR4_VALUE, AR5_VALUE, AR6_VALUE, SOURCE_TXT, MANUAL_INPUT_VALUE, NOTE_TXT, SOURCE_DOCUMENT_NM, SOURCE_PAGE_NO, SORT_ORDR, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, FRST_REGISTER_ID, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, LAST_UPDUSR_ID ) VALUES ( #{rowId}, #{sectionCode}, #{sectionOrder}, #{commonName}, #{formula}, #{ar4Value}, #{ar5Value}, #{ar6Value}, #{source}, #{manualInputValue}, #{note}, #{sourceDocumentName}, #{sourcePageNo}, #{sortOrder}, CURRENT_DATETIME, #{actorId}, CURRENT_DATETIME, #{actorId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE ADMIN_EMISSION_GWP_VALUE SET SECTION_CODE = #{sectionCode}, SECTION_ORDR = #{sectionOrder}, COMMON_NAME = #{commonName}, FORMULA = #{formula}, AR4_VALUE = #{ar4Value}, AR5_VALUE = #{ar5Value}, AR6_VALUE = #{ar6Value}, SOURCE_TXT = #{source}, MANUAL_INPUT_VALUE = #{manualInputValue}, NOTE_TXT = #{note}, SOURCE_DOCUMENT_NM = #{sourceDocumentName}, SOURCE_PAGE_NO = #{sourcePageNo}, SORT_ORDR = #{sortOrder}, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = CURRENT_DATETIME, LAST_UPDUSR_ID = #{actorId} WHERE ROW_ID = #{rowId}
